characters.name: Benny
characters.description: Bennyis the overall deuteragonist of ToddWorld. He'sTodd's playful and cool pet dog, and one of Todd's best friends. He is a Golden Retriever mix. He is a calm dog voiced byDoron Bell, Jr. Benny is energetic and very playful with a big apetite. He loves to eat and usually thinks about food if he isn't in the middle of enjoying it. He can be lazy at times, and sleeps in a lot. But he also likes to hang out with the group, valuing his bond with Todd above all else- to the point of acting childishly if he feels their time together is being tampered with, or worrying over Todd's opinions of him if he should mess up. While Benny acts cool outwardly, he shows that he, like the others has his own concerns and worries. He can be clumsy at times.

characters.name: Judy
characters.description: Judy is a female alien and Vark’s little sister that is a background character onToddworld. She is seen in multiple episodes. In "Stella's Different Ears", she and Her Older BrotherVarkwere watching the spider. In "It's OK Not to Win", she is seen in the audience. In the theme song, she is seen in the end of the theme song. It is possible is she is Vark's brother. Judy's name is based on the Zootopia character, Judy Hopps. She has purple antennae, green skin, triangular eyes, a pink dress, and purple and pink shoes. In "Dirt Day", she was part ofVark's family. Judy has high IQ when she is enrolled as a student at ToddWorld Academy. Judy in the grass.

characters.name: Officer Becky
characters.description: Officer Becky is a giraffe who’s the resident police officer of ToddWorld. She is voiced by Kathleen Barr. Officer Becky is a tall yellow giraffe with red and blue spots. She serves as ToddWorld’s resident police officer and is able to help Todd and his friends when needed. Though she made several appearances throughout the first season, she began to play a much bigger role in a few episodes of the second season. Near the end ofStella’s Star Day, the gang invites her to see their show. When she notices Stella in the audience, she wonders why she is not in the show with her friends. Stella tells her that she quit because Sophie got the part that she wanted, but then feels left out. Officer Becky encourages Stella to apologize to her friends and ask them if they’ll still let her in the show, which they do.

characters.name: Pickle
characters.description: Pickleis one ofTodd's best friends and one of the three tritagonists (alongsideSophieandStella) of ToddWorld. He lives in a circus and owns it. He is voiced by Peter Kelamis in the US and Justin Fletcher in the UK. Pickle is very goofy and off-the-wall. He is all about having fun and has many talents thanks to growing up in a circus, but he can be clumsy sometimes. He is often curious about new experiences and people, although he may act suspicious of them at first or worry over silly things until he realizes that he should have just asked. He can be a little cowardly. His energetic and friendly personality allows him to easily bond with his friends and other people. He may not be the brightest of the group, but he is capable of helping out or come up with some zany ideas. While he may not seem to like it, deep down Pickle is concerned over physical things involving himself, such as having to wear reading glasses, or his height. Pickle is a 10-year-old funny clown. He is tall with green skin and has a blue nose. He wears a yellow crown on his head, along with a red sweater that has yellow stripes on the arms, purple trousers with red, light blue, green, and yellow spots. He also wears yellow shoes.

characters.name: Sophie
characters.description: Sophieis one of the three tritagonists (alongsideStellaandPickle) of ToddWorld. She is a colorful girl with a bright imagination. She is voiced byChantal Strand. Genuinely Sophie cares for others, with an empathy that allows her to easily befriend anyone. She is sweet and friendly and loves having fun, Sophie is a smart and creative girl who loves to invent new things. It's easy for her to come up with ideas or plans, but she can be a bit stubborn if her plans don't work, which can be both a good thing and a bad thing. On one hand, it allows her to keep pushing for new ideas and usually solve problems, but on the other hand if she struggles too much, she starts having a sinking feeling and gets sad and tries not to instantly judge others if she is able to help it. Compared to the others she can be gentle and withdrawn. She will try to speak out if others talk over her unless convinced it is the right thing to do. She does not like confrontations or arguments. Sophie is a 9-year-old girl who has yellow skin and thick reddish orange hair that she wears in pigtails that stick up and give her the ability to fly and hover and it also flaps faster like an antenna. She wears a light blue long sleeved dress and a pair of shoes, one red, one indigo.

characters.name: Stella
characters.description: Stellais one of Todd's best friends and one of the three tritagonists (alongsideSophieandPickle) ofToddWorld. She is voiced byMaggie Blue O'Harain season 1 andBritt McKillipin season 2. Stella is a fashionable and obsessional young girl who is fairly talented in many subjects. She is a fully girly-girl, obsessed with glitter and sparkles, stars, hair accessories, and anything pink; however, she also enjoys playing sports, acting, and baking. Stella is also a caring friend, showing that she will do what she can to make someone feel better and is highly empathetic (such as the time Todd lost his colors). She is mature and creative, but she is not above begging or manipulating someone with tears if she really wants something. However, she doesn't do this often. At times, she can be fairly temperamental and bossy if annoyed. In her attempts to help someone she can also become overly pushy or act rudely and not realize it straight away. She can also be very self-conscious regarding how she looks. It’s not that she’s a sarcastic beauty queen and she’s never bossy. Stella is a 11-year-old girl who has yellow skin and black hair that curls up on end, adorned by a pink and blue bow on the top of her head. Hidden under her hair are her twodifferent colored ears, one being blue, the other orange. Her normal attire is a pink long-sleeved dress and tights with a pattern of blue and yellow stars to match her shoes.

characters.name: Todd
characters.description: Toddis the titular overall main protagonist of ToddWorld. He is a colorful boy with a bright imagination. He was voiced byRyan Hirakidain the US and Nathan Simpson/Declan Barnes in the UK. Todd (Age: 6 years old] is an imaginative kid leader who loves making DIY crafts and using his imagination for all kinds of creative stuff. Todd's best friends are Benny, Sophie, Stella, and Pickle. Todd lives in a yellow house with eight freckles, with red and blue socks attached to the building, orange and green and blue shapes for the windows, and a green door. (This is called: Todd's House)

characters.name: Vark
characters.description: Vark is a green alien from the Planet Glick. He is very good at hide and seek, and his favorite food is spotzum. Vark has a pet space monster named Zabuna. Vark lives on the Planet Glick. Vark is a dark green alien with two ears and 3 eyes. He wears a blue sweater on with blue trousers, and he also wears red and yellow shoes.
